scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,ADMIN,APP" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green" "npm start --prefix hipermidia.api" "npm run dev --prefix hipermidia.admin" "npm run dev --prefix hipermidia.app"
scripts.build: (cd hipermidia.app && npm install && npm run build) && (cd hipermidia.admin && npm install && npm run build) && (cd hipermidia.api && npm install)
